objectives.title: Neuro-symbolic planning engine for autonomous task decomposition
objectives.description: Develop a hybrid neuro-symbolic planning engine that decomposes high-level natural language goals into executable sub-task graphs with formally specified pre-conditions, post-conditions, and verification checkpoints.
objectives.measurable_target: Achieve ≥40% improvement in plan success rate over pure LLM-based agent baselines (ReAct, Reflexion) on standardised agent benchmarks (WebArena, SWE-bench, GAIA) for tasks requiring >10 sequential steps.

objectives.title: Unified adaptive memory architecture
objectives.description: Design and implement a unified memory architecture integrating working memory, episodic memory, and semantic memory stores with a learned memory controller that manages information flow between stores.
objectives.measurable_target: Demonstrate ≥30% improvement in task coherence and factual consistency over context-window-only baselines in interaction sequences exceeding 50 agent steps, measured on MAESTRO's long-horizon evaluation suite.

objectives.title: Decentralised multi-agent coordination protocols
objectives.description: Develop formally specified task-delegation and negotiation protocols that enable heterogeneous AI agents to coordinate on shared objectives with provable convergence guarantees and auditable interaction traces.
objectives.measurable_target: Demonstrate effective coordination of ≥5 heterogeneous agents on shared tasks, with ≥25% improvement in joint task completion over independent agent baselines, and formal proof of protocol convergence.

objectives.title: Healthcare demonstrator — clinical decision support
objectives.description: Validate the integrated MAESTRO agent framework in a clinical decision support system that assists clinicians in diagnostic reasoning by autonomously gathering patient data, planning differential diagnoses, and coordinating specialist sub-agents.
objectives.measurable_target: Achieve diagnostic reasoning accuracy within 10% of specialist clinician performance on a benchmark of 500 de-identified clinical cases spanning 5 diagnostic domains, validated by clinical experts at NIHS.

objectives.title: Manufacturing demonstrator — process optimisation
objectives.description: Validate the integrated MAESTRO agent framework in a multi-agent system that monitors, diagnoses, and optimises manufacturing processes in real time across production line segments.
objectives.measurable_target: Demonstrate ≥15% reduction in defect rates and ≥10% reduction in energy consumption compared to baseline operations in a pilot factory environment at ISIA, validated over a 3-month operational period.

objectives.title: Logistics demonstrator — supply chain planning
objectives.description: Validate the integrated MAESTRO agent framework in an agent-based supply chain planning system that coordinates logistics operations across multiple actors, re-plans in response to disruptions, and maintains consistent state.
objectives.measurable_target: Demonstrate ≥20% improvement in disruption recovery time and ≥15% improvement in delivery schedule adherence compared to current planning systems, validated on ELI operational scenarios across 3 supply chain corridors.

objectives.title: Open framework release and ecosystem contribution
objectives.description: Release the MAESTRO agent framework as open-source software, contribute all models, benchmarks, and evaluation results to the AI-on-demand platform, and validate demonstrator results through Testing and Experiment Facilities.
objectives.measurable_target: Open-source release with ≥500 GitHub stars within 6 months of release; contributions accepted to AI-on-demand platform; results validated through ≥2 TEFs; technology transfer initiated through ≥3 EDIHs.
